claims.summary: The hold-fill boundary must return exactly 45,000 ms.
claims.disposition: Verified the exact recovery-window test at STALE_SEMANTIC_RECOVERY_HOLD_FILL.

claims.summary: The semantic stale-window sigmoid must match its documented formula and hand over smoothly.
claims.disposition: Verified manual-formula, epsilon-boundary, monotonic sweep, and release-cliff tests.

claims.summary: Narrative retention should expose the shared semantic window without claiming control.
claims.disposition: Verified narrative_semantic_retention_review and its no-control semantics.

claims.summary: Changing hold or release windows could alter felt continuity.
claims.disposition: Preserved as Tier 5 because stale-window tuning changes live semantic retention.
